channel.title: AsyncFlow on FsFlow
channel.description: Recent content in AsyncFlow on FsFlow

item.title: AsyncFlow.apply
item.description:
Applies an async-flow-wrapped function to an async-flow-wrapped value.

let apply (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value -> 'next>) (value: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'next>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: Builders.asyncFlow
item.description:
The core asyncFlow { } computation expression.

Remarks

Use this builder when the runtime boundary is async-first and you need to compose `Async` work with the same explicit environment model as `Flow`. It is the right landing point for async orchestration that still wants typed failures instead of exceptions. Use `Guard.Of` for check-like sources and `Guard.MapError` for existing-error remapping before binding into the async CE. `Guard` keeps the source visible to the CE and only packages the failure value.

Information

  • Module: Builders
  • Source: source

Examples

let fetchProfile =
    asyncFlow {
        let! api = AsyncFlow.read (fun env -> env.Api)
        let! profile = api.LoadProfile()
        return profile
    }

item.title: AsyncFlow.bind
item.description:
Sequences an async continuation after a successful value.

let bind (binder: 'value -> AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'next>) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'next>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.catch
item.description:
Catches exceptions raised during execution and maps them to a typed error.

let catch (handler: exn -> 'error) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.delay
item.description:
Defers async flow construction until execution time.

let delay (factory: unit -> AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.env
item.description:
Reads the current environment as the flow value.

let env<'env, 'error> : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'env>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.error
item.description:
Creates a failing async flow.

let error (failure: 'error) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.fail
item.description:
Alias for error that reads well in some call sites.

let fail (failure: 'error) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.fromAsync
item.description:
Lifts an async value into an async flow.

let fromAsync (operation: Async<'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.fromAsyncResult
item.description:
Lifts an async result into an async flow.

let fromAsyncResult (operation: Async<Result<'value, 'error>>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.fromFlow
item.description:
Lifts a synchronous flow into an async flow.

let fromFlow (flow: Flow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.fromOption
item.description:
Lifts an option into an async flow with the supplied error.

let fromOption (error: 'error) (value: 'value option) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.fromResult
item.description:
Lifts a Result into an async flow.

let fromResult (result: Result<'value, 'error>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.fromValueOption
item.description:
Lifts a value option into an async flow with the supplied error.

let fromValueOption (error: 'error) (value: 'value voption) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.ignore
item.description:
Maps the successful value of an async flow to unit.

let ignore (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.localEnv
item.description:
Transforms the environment before running the async flow.

let localEnv (mapping: 'outerEnvironment -> 'innerEnvironment) (flow: AsyncFlow<'innerEnvironment, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'outerEnvironment, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.map
item.description:
Maps the successful value of an async flow.

let map (mapper: 'value -> 'next) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'next>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.map2
item.description:
Combines two async flows with a mapping function.

let map2 (mapper: 'left -> 'right -> 'value) (left: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'left>) (right: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'right>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.map3
item.description:
Combines three async flows with a mapping function.

let map3 (mapper: 'left -> 'middle -> 'right -> 'value) (left: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'left>) (middle: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'middle>) (right: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'right>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.mapError
item.description:
Maps the error value of an async flow.

let mapError (mapper: 'error -> 'nextError) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'nextError, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.ok
item.description:
Creates a successful async flow.

let ok (value: 'value) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.orElse
item.description:
Falls back to another async flow when the source flow fails.

let orElse (fallback: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.orElseAsync
item.description:
Turns a pure validation result into an async flow with async-provided failure.

let orElseAsync (errorAsync: Async<'error>) (result: Result<'value, unit>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Returns

An AsyncFlow that mirrors the result or produces the async error.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.orElseAsyncFlow
item.description:
Turns a pure validation result into an async flow whose failure value comes from another async flow.

let orElseAsyncFlow (errorFlow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'error>) (result: Result<'value, unit>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.orElseFlow
item.description:
Turns a pure validation result into an async flow with synchronous environment-provided failure.

let orElseFlow (errorFlow: Flow<'env, 'error, 'error>) (result: Result<'value, unit>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.orElseWith
item.description:
Falls back to another async flow when the source flow fails.

let orElseWith (fallback: 'error -> AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.provideLayer
item.description:
Provides a derived environment from a layer flow to a downstream flow.

let provideLayer (layer: AsyncFlow<'input, 'error, 'environment>) (flow: AsyncFlow<'environment, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'input, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.read
item.description:
Projects a value from the current environment.

let read (projection: 'env -> 'value) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.run
item.description:
Executes an async flow with the provided environment.

let run (environment: 'env) (AsyncFlow operation: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : Async<Result<'value, 'error>>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.sequence
item.description:
Transforms a sequence of async flows into an async flow of a sequence and stops at the first failure.

let sequence (flows: seq<AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value list>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.succeed
item.description:
Alias for ok that reads well in some call sites.

let succeed (value: 'value) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.tap
item.description:
Runs an async side effect on success and preserves the original value.

let tap (binder: 'value -> AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, unit>) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.tapError
item.description:
Runs an async side effect on failure and preserves the original error.

let tapError (binder: 'error -> AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, unit>) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.toAsync
item.description:
Converts an async flow into its raw async result shape.

let toAsync (environment: 'env) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : Async<Result<'value, 'error>>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.traverse
item.description:
Transforms a sequence of values into an async flow and stops at the first failure.

let traverse (mapping: 'value -> AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'next>) (values: seq<'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'next list>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.value
item.description:
Alias for ok that reads well in some call sites.

let value (item: 'value) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.zip
item.description:
Combines two async flows into a tuple of their values.

let zip (left: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'left>) (right: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'right>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'left * 'right>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow
  • Source: source
